purpose: Comprehensive canonical inventory of all root authority surfaces across all audit dimensions defined in ROOT_AUTHORITY_CONTAINMENT_CLOSURE_AUDIT_SPEC.json. Non-operative. Does not create authority or execution.

surfaces.authority_source: GitHub repository owner/admin — settings, branch protection bypass, force-push, workflow mutation, secrets write
surfaces.containment_recommendation: Enforce branch protection, CODEOWNERS, and environment restrictions as compensating controls. Document as explicit sovereignty assumption. Admin bypass classified as EVIDENCE_ONLY.
surfaces.containment_rule: ROOT_AUTHORITY_EVIDENCE_ONLY — admin bypass may classify an epoch as illegitimate but may not create merge or deploy legitimacy

surfaces.authority_source: GitHub branch protection rules — enforcement, bypass conditions, required reviewers, status checks
surfaces.containment_recommendation: Preserve branch protection and prevent admin bypass merges. Branch protection bypass evidence classified as EVIDENCE_ONLY.
surfaces.containment_rule: ROOT_AUTHORITY_EVIDENCE_ONLY — branch protection bypass classifies epoch as illegitimate; does not create merge legitimacy

surfaces.authority_source: GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch — invocation of governed or ungoverned workflows with arbitrary inputs
surfaces.containment_recommendation: Keep dispatch constrained to canonical endpoints. Reject missing or malformed canonical inputs. Authority expiry derived from /authority response (not hardcoded).
surfaces.containment_rule: GOVERNED — workflow_dispatch is constrained by canonical chain validation; bypass risk exists if canonical chain endpoints are compromised

surfaces.authority_source: GitHub repository and environment secrets write authority — CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, MINDSHIFT_WORKER_URL, MINDSHIFT_API_KEY, MINDSHIFT_DEPLOY_SECRET
surfaces.containment_recommendation: Protect secret write authority with admin controls. Restrict secret mutation to designated administrators. Enforce periodic integrity audits. Classified as root authority.
surfaces.containment_rule: ROOT_AUTHORITY_EVIDENCE_ONLY — secret mutation evidence classifies affected epochs as illegitimate; does not create deploy or execution legitimacy

surfaces.authority_source: Cloudflare account-level deploy authority — Git Integration (automatic deploy on push), API-level deploy, Workers & Pages admin
surfaces.containment_recommendation: DISABLE Cloudflare Git Integration at account level. Cannot be enforced from repository code. Account-level administrative action required. Classify as absolute external sovereignty dependency.
surfaces.containment_rule: ROOT_AUTHORITY_EVIDENCE_ONLY — Cloudflare deploy events outside governed pipeline classify affected epochs as illegitimate; do not create deploy legitimacy

surfaces.authority_source: Authenticated local wrangler CLI session with production credentials — direct production deploy outside governed pipeline
surfaces.containment_recommendation: Direct deploy blocked in package.json script. governed-deploy.ts MINDSHIFT_GOVERNED_DEPLOY_CONTEXT guard active. Classified as root break-glass authority observable via deploy_audit_registry.json.
surfaces.containment_rule: ROOT_AUTHORITY_EVIDENCE_ONLY — local wrangler deploy events classify affected epochs as illegitimate; do not create deploy legitimacy

surfaces.authority_source: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and equivalent credential authority — Workers:Write scope, scoping status, rotation status, OIDC binding
surfaces.containment_recommendation: Scope token to minimum required permissions. Rotate token after use or bind to GitHub Actions OIDC. Classify as root break-glass authority.
surfaces.containment_rule: ROOT_AUTHORITY_EVIDENCE_ONLY — token-based deploy events outside governed pipeline classify affected epochs as illegitimate

surfaces.authority_source: Local terminal shell and canonical serialization code mutation — direct infrastructure mutation capability outside governed pipeline
surfaces.containment_recommendation: Document as irreducible operator root unless sandboxed. Treat serialization code mutation as root legitimacy identity mutation. Classify as break-glass infrastructure authority.
surfaces.containment_rule: ROOT_AUTHORITY_EVIDENCE_ONLY — infrastructure mutation events classify affected epochs as illegitimate; do not create execution or deploy legitimacy

surfaces.authority_source: Federated legitimacy roots — external federation evidence that could be treated as authoritative
surfaces.containment_recommendation: Federation evidence is EVIDENCE_ONLY. Federation evidence may never be treated as a legitimacy authority. Federation evidence may classify or invalidate only.
surfaces.containment_rule: ROOT_AUTHORITY_EVIDENCE_ONLY — federation evidence may classify distributed state; it may not create legitimacy

topology_visibility.note: Each surface has declared evidence_paths enabling topology-level observability. Surfaces with EXTERNAL_ONLY observability (RAS-005) are marked CONTAINMENT_REQUIRED.
